---
title: "Fortbildung"
subtitle: "REST APIs"
format: revealjs
---

# HTTP Grundlagen & Datenformate

{{< include 01-http-grundlagen.qmd >}}
{{< include 01-curl.qmd >}}

# REST Prinzipien
{{< include 02-rest-prinzipien.qmd >}}

# Authentifizierung
{{< include 03-auth.qmd >}}

# Dokumentation (OpenAPI)
{{< include 04-openapi.qmd >}}
{{< include 04-prax-hoppscotch.qmd >}}

# Caching
{{< include 05-caching.qmd >}}

# Ausblick
{{< include xx-ausblick.qmd >}}
